channel.title: Text-Editor on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Text-Editor on Arrans github.io

item.title: zed-industries/zed
item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

item.title: mawww/kakoune
item.description: mawww’s experiment for a better code editor

item.title: zyedidia/micro
item.description: A modern and intuitive terminal-based text editor

item.title: aretext/aretext
item.description: Minimalist text editor with vim-compatible key bindings.

item.title: lapce/lapce
item.description: Lightning-fast and Powerful Code Editor written in Rust

item.title: vcnovaes/gkilo
item.description: A text editor written in Go
